prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约8710→8925→8280→7783→7140，整体呈前移趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前移约1140名，2025年基准约7140名；本省物理类计划2021年154人、2022年149人、2023年149人、2024年137人、2025年139人；2026年计划121人，较2025年减少18人（缩招约13%），招生名额明显缩减， 竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第37名，近年排名稳定在36–37位，属全国顶尖工科院校；2025年高考周期声誉评 价偏正面，投档线稳步提升（从211第14升至第3），入选国家卓越工程师学院，保研率升至27%；2026年周期因实验室安全事故出现偏负面信号，但整体关注度一般；抖音热度排 名第61（一般），国防七子标签持续吸引考生关注；航空宇航科学与技术A-、力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、控制科学与工程A-、软件工程A-；与该校 航空航天类、电子信息类、自动化等招生专业高度匹配，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（ 推荐）等该校核心专业社会热度持续升温；本省物理类考生2026年约34.7万人，较2025年约32万人增加约8.4%，竞争基数扩大，较2024年422分 下降，卷面难度可能有所变化；南京航空航天大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，地域吸引力强；该校在湖南招生规模适中，2026年物理类121人，占比较 小但稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类招生计划缩招约13%、本省考生规模增加约8.4%、学校声誉正面及优势学科吸引力强等因素，缩招带来的竞争加剧效应与考生增加 相互叠加，但近年位次持续前移的趋势（2023→2025年累计前移1140名）显示该校在湖南热度持续上升；预测2026年最低位次约6635名，区间6135–7135名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8710 → 8925 → 8280 → 7783 → 7140, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the past 3 years, the cumulative forward shift is about 1140 places, with a 2025 baseline of about 7140. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 154 in 2021, 149 in 2022, 149 in 2023, 137 in 2024, and 139 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 121, a decrease of 18 from 2025 (about 13% reduction), indicating a significant reduction in enrollment and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable position around 36–37 in recent years, belonging to the top engineering universities nationwide. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was relatively positive, with steadily increasing admission scores (rising from 14th to 3rd among 211 universities). It was selected for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and the graduate recommendation rate rose to 27%. In the 2026 cycle, due to a laboratory safety incident, there were slightly negative signals, but overall attention was moderate. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (average), and the 'Defense Seven Sons' label continues to attract candidates. Disciplines include Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology (A-), Mechanics (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Management Science and Engineering (A), Control Science and Engineering (A-), and Software Engineering (A-). These align highly with the university's enrollment majors such as Aerospace, Electronic Information, and Automation, showcasing strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), and Computer Science (recommended) continue to see rising social popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from approximately 320,000 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Compared to the 2024 score of 422, there is a decrease, suggesting possible changes in exam difficulty. Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal. Its enrollment scale in Hunan is moderate, with 121 Physics Category students in 2026, a relatively small but stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the approximately 13% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, an approximately 8.4% increase in provincial candidates, positive university reputation, and strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, the intensified competition from enrollment reduction and the increase in candidates are mutually reinforcing. However, the recent trend of continuous forward movement in rankings (cumulative forward shift of 1140 places from 2023 to 2025) indicates that the university's popularity in Hunan is steadily rising. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 6635, with a range of 6135–7135.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 6635, with a range of 6135–7135. If your ranking falls within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Aerospace, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering as primary choices, with Tier 1 Top Innovation Classes as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<6135), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>7135), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as supplementary.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2054 → 2464 → 2454 → 2624 → 2560, showing an overall backward trend (ranking number increases), with a cumulative backward shift of about 506 places over the past 5 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 2560; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 5 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 18, an increase of 7 from 2025 (an expansion of about 64%), significantly increasing enrollment places and easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, a top national engineering school, but History Category is not its strength; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was relatively positive, with steadily increasing admission scores; in the 2026 cycle, negative signals emerged due to a laboratory safety accident, but mainly affecting the perception of Science Category candidates; Douyin popularity ranking 61st (average), with limited attention to History Category; the university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering, and History Category majors (Broadcasting and Television, English) are limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (recommended), Chinese Language/Literature (recommended), Finance/Economics (differentiated wait-and-see) and other liberal arts majors have divided social popularity; the number of History Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% from about 143,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the competition base, and compared to the 2024 score of 438, the exam difficulty may have changed; Nanjing, located in the core city of the Yangtze River Delta, still has some regional appeal for liberal arts candidates; the university's History Category enrollment scale is small, with 18 in 2026, still a niche choice after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the 2026 History Category enrollment plan by about 64% and the increase in provincial candidate numbers by about 31.2%, the competition relief effect from expansion roughly offsets the increase in candidates; however, the ranking has been continuously shifting backward in recent years (cumulative shift of 506 places from 2021 to 2025), and the university's liberal arts are not its strength, with limited popularity; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 3508, with a range of 3008–4008.

The university has few History Category majors, offering limited choices.
